name: lumia
author: emtyty
description: A cross-platform screen capture, annotation, and sharing tool for Windows and macOS

scripts.pack:mac: node scripts/unlock-keychain.js && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.release:mac: export GH_TOKEN=$(gh auth token) && node scripts/unlock-keychain.js && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish always -c.afterSign=scripts/notarize.js
scripts.release:win: export GH_TOKEN=$(gh auth token) && npm run build && electron-builder --win --publish always
